generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mother and grandmother, I've always believed in strong national defense. But have you seen how our allies are cutting back while expecting us to carry the burden? It's not fair to our troops or our families. We need to increase defense spending to ensure our security and maintain our commitments. #NationalSecurity #SupportOurTroops
